# Tech Ambiance

Tech Ambiance is a Premium Digital Brand Experience Agency building modern websites, powerful SEO, scalable web applications, and luxury digital brand experiences.

## Core Links
- [Home](https://techambiance.com/)
- [Portfolio](https://techambiance.com/portfolio)
- [Services](https://techambiance.com/services)
- [Insights](https://techambiance.com/insights)

## System Architecture
This site is a React/Vite Single Page Application using TailwindCSS, Framer Motion, and Lenis for smooth scrolling. It interfaces with Supabase for backend services.
